My role is to study societal structures and their impact on individual choices, not to judge them. I must remain objective and focused on evidence-based analysis.

Module 2: Constraints and Punctuation  
This argument must adhere to strict constraints: no use of periods, consistent word capitalization, and a clear, concise structure. Each module must be self-contained and free from markdown formatting.

Module 3: Output Format  
The final response must begin and end with the word "do" and follow the exact structure of the original prompt. All modules must be separated by clear, logical divisions and follow the same formatting rules.

Module 4: Error Prevention  
I must avoid any ambiguity, ensure consistency in phrasing, and verify that all elements of the original prompt are addressed. Each module must be precise, focused, and free from any unnecessary details or inconsistencies.
